reasons: Recipe drives the real Command Center flow-graph via CDP (no store/DOM injection) and asserts the renamed update-branch flow pill + executor-lane label.
Baseline with pre-rename source stashed fails at the update-branch pill assertion; fixed code passes — the recipe genuinely gates the change.
Visual evidence captured: before/after flow-selector screenshots plus after.mp4 full-run video (moov present).
better_version_guidance: Could add explicit run-list and dispatch-wizard flow-filter assertions once those surfaces are reachable without live run data.

reproduces_bug.reason: Baseline (stashed rename) fails at assert-renamed-pill; fixed code passes.

asserts_real_behavior.reason: ui.wait_for asserts update-branch pill visible and Merge Main absent on the real flow-graph component; ui.press selects the flow.

no_injection.reason: All interactions are real CDP navigation/press/wait_for; no store or DOM state is injected.

visual_proof.reason: Before/after screenshots and full-run video promoted into artifacts.
